patterns.regex: ^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*The reversal of Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+for transaction (?<origRef>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M) is complete\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*You have used Fuliza M-PESA\.\s*Amount used Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*Access fee charged Ksh(?<fee>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?(?:\s*Total Fuliza M-PESA outstanding is Ksh[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?\.)?(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+from your M-PESA has been used to pay your outstanding Fuliza M-PESA on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New Fuliza M-PESA outstanding amount is Ksh[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?\.)?(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+transferred to M-Shwari account on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+transferred from M-Shwari account to your M-PESA account on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+transferred to KCB M-PESA account on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+transferred from KCB M-PESA account to your M-PESA account on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*You have withdrawn Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+from agent (?<party>\d+\s*-\s*[A-Za-z0-9 &.'\-]+?) on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?(?:\s*Transaction cost,\s?Ksh(?<fee>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*You have deposited Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+to your M-PESA account from agent (?<party>\d+\s*-\s*[A-Za-z0-9 &.'\-]+?) on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+sent to (?<party>[A-Za-z0-9 &.'\-]+? - POCHI LA BIASHARA)\s+\d{9,12} on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?(?:\s*Transaction cost,\s?Ksh(?<fee>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+paid to (?<party>[A-Za-z0-9 &.'\-]+?) for account (?<account>[A-Za-z0-9\-]+) on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?(?:\s*Transaction cost,\s?Ksh(?<fee>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*You bought Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+of airtime on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?

^(?<ref>[A-Z0-9]{8,12})\s+Confirmed\.\s*You have received Ksh(?<amount>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\s+from (?<party>[A-Za-z0-9 &.'\-]+?)\s+\d{9,12} on (?<date>\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{2,4}) at (?<time>\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s?[AP]M)\.(?:\s*New M-PESA balance is Ksh(?<balance>[\d,]+(?:\.\d{1,2})?)\.)?
